debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
f : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
⊢ ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) ⇑f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖

unfold cfc_toComplexMeasure
  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]
  simp only [compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toContinuousLinearMap,
    ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE_symm_apply,
    cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  calc
    ‖⟪x, ((cfcHom (IsSelfAdjoint.isStarNormal ha)) f) y⟫_ℂ‖
      ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖((cfcHom (IsSelfAdjoint.isStarNormal ha)) f) y‖ := norm_inner_le_norm x _
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * (‖((cfcHom (IsSelfAdjoint.isStarNormal ha)) f)‖ * ‖y‖) :=
      mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_opNorm _ y) (norm_nonneg x)
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖((cfcHom (IsSelfAdjoint.isStarNormal ha)) f)‖ := by ring
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by rw [norm_cfcHom a f]

  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]
  simp only [compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe]
  have h : ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y

          have hbound := cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y
          simp only [ContinuousLinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply]
          calc ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖f‖
              ≤ (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) * ‖f‖ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hbound (norm_nonneg _)
            _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by ring

  convert h using 2
  ext z
  simp only [ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.coe_toContinuousMap]

  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]

        (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _).symm.toContinuousLinearMap‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := by
    apply ContinuousLinearMap.opNorm_le_bound

    · intro g
      simp only [compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe,
        ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toContinuousLinearMap]
      calc ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm g)‖
          ≤ ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm g‖ :=
            ContinuousLinearMap.le_opNorm _ _
        _ ≤ (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) * ‖g‖ := by
            apply mul_le_mul (cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y)
            · simp only [ContinuousLinearEquiv.norm_symm_apply_le]
            · norm_num
            · positivity
  calc ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y
        (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm

    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by ring

      (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm

      ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖((cfcHom (IsSelfAdjoint.isStarNormal ha)) 
        (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm 
          (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE f))) y‖ := 
        norm_inner_le_norm x _
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * (‖((cfcHom (IsSelfAdjoint.isStarNormal ha)) 
        (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm 
          (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE f)))‖ * ‖y‖) := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_opNorm _ y) (norm_nonneg x)
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖((cfcHom (IsSelfAdjoint.isStarNormal ha)) 
        (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm 
          (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE f)))‖ := by ring
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖(ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm 
          (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE f))‖ := by 
        rw [norm_cfcHom a]
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by simp

unfold cfc_toComplexMeasure
  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]
  simp only [compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe, cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  rw [ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE_symm_apply]
  calc
    ‖⟪x, (cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y⟫_ℂ‖
      ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖(cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y‖ := norm_inner_le_norm x ((cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y)
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * (‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ * ‖y‖) :=
        mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_opNorm (cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y) (norm_nonneg x)
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ := by ring
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by rw [norm_cfcHom a f]

unfold cfc_toComplexMeasure
  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]
  simp only [compSL_apply, cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  calc
    ‖⟪x, (cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f y)⟫_ℂ‖
      ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖(cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y‖ := norm_inner_le_norm x _
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * (‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ * ‖y‖) :=
        mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_opNorm _ y) (norm_nonneg x)
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ := by ring
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by rw [norm_cfcHom a f]

unfold cfc_toComplexMeasure
  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]
  simp only [compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe]
  have h : (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE (𝕜 := ℂ) (A := ℂ)).symm f = 
           ⟨f, f.zeroAtInfty⟩ := rfl
  simp only [h, cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  calc
    ‖⟪x, (cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y⟫_ℂ‖ 
      ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖(cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y‖ := norm_inner_le_norm x _
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * (‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ * ‖y‖) := 
        mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_opNorm _ y) (norm_nonneg x)
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ := by ring
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by rw [norm_cfcHom a f]

unfold cfc_toComplexMeasure
  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]
  simp only [compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe, cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  have h := cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y
  calc
    ‖⟪x, (cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y⟫_ℂ‖
      = ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y f‖ := by simp
    _ ≤ ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖f‖ := ContinuousLinearMap.le_opNorm _ _
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) * ‖f‖ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h (norm_nonneg f)
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by ring

unfold cfc_toComplexMeasure
  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]
  simp only [compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe]
  have h1 : (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE (𝕜 := ℂ)).symm f = 
    ⟨f, by exact f.zeroAtInfty⟩ := rfl
  simp only [h1, cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  calc
    ‖⟪x, (cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y⟫_ℂ‖
      ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖(cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y‖ := norm_inner_le_norm x ((cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y)
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * (‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ * ‖y‖) := 
        mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_opNorm (cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y) (norm_nonneg x)
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ := by ring
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by rw [norm_cfcHom a f]

unfold cfc_toComplexMeasure
  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]
  simp only [compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe]
  have h1 : ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y
  calc
    ‖(cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y) ((ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE).symm f)‖
      ≤ ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖(ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE).symm f‖ :=
        ContinuousLinearMap.le_opNorm _ _
    _ ≤ ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖f‖ := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (norm_nonneg _)
        simp only [ContinuousLinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply]
        rfl
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) * ‖f‖ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h1 (norm_nonneg _)

unfold cfc_toComplexMeasure
  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]
  simp only [compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe, cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  have h1 : ‖⟪x, (cfcHom ha.isStarNormal (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm
    (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE f)) y)⟫_ℂ‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by
    simp only [ContinuousLinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply]
    calc
      ‖⟪x, (cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y⟫_ℂ‖
        ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖(cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y‖ := norm_inner_le_norm x ((cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y)
      _ ≤ ‖x‖ * (‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ * ‖y‖) :=
        mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_opNorm (cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y) (norm_nonneg x)
      _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ := by ring
      _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by rw [norm_cfcHom a f]
  convert h1 using 2
  simp only [ContinuousLinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply]

unfold cfc_toComplexMeasure
  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]
  simp only [compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toContinuousLinearMap,
    LinearIsometryEquiv.coe_toContinuousLinearEquiv, cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  calc
    ‖⟪x, (cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y⟫_ℂ‖
      ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖(cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f) y‖ := norm_inner_le_norm x _
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * (‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ * ‖y‖) := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_opNorm _ y) (norm_nonneg x)
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ := by ring
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by rw [norm_cfcHom a f]

unfold cfc_toComplexMeasure
  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]
  simp only [compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe]
  have h : ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm f)‖ 
      ≤ ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖(ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm f : C((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ))‖ :=
    ContinuousLinearMap.le_opNorm _ _
  calc ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm f)‖
      ≤ ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖(ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm f : C((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ))‖ := h
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) * ‖(ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm f : C((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ))‖ := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y) (norm_nonneg _)
    _ = (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) * ‖f‖ := by
        congr 1
        simp only [ContinuousLinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply]
        rfl
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by ring

unfold cfc_toComplexMeasure
  rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral]
  simp only [compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe]
  have h : (ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE (𝕜 := ℂ)).symm f = 
    ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInfty f := rfl
  simp only [h, ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInfty_apply]
  simp only [cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  calc
    ‖⟪x, ((cfcHom (IsSelfAdjoint.isStarNormal ha)) f) y⟫_ℂ‖
      ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖((cfcHom (IsSelfAdjoint.isStarNormal ha)) f) y‖ := norm_inner_le_norm x _
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * (‖((cfcHom (IsSelfAdjoint.isStarNormal ha)) f)‖ * ‖y‖) :=
      mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_opNorm _ y) (norm_nonneg x)
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖((cfcHom (IsSelfAdjoint.isStarNormal ha)) f)‖ := by ring
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by rw [norm_cfcHom a f]
